make_wish.title: Make a wish using the Genie (As You Wish mod — choose a wish that benefits your civilization)

wish_used.title: Experience the outcome of your wish — the Genie delivers what was asked

subtitle.text: There are no wrong wishes at Ch17. You have done the hard part already.

description: The Genie's wishes in As You Wish include various gameplay effects:
You have been earning things through work since Ch01.
This is the one time something is given to you.
Use it on something you actually want.
The Genie represents the one rule exception —
the universe acknowledging that you did everything correctly.
Every previous civilization fell. You didn't.
One wish is the universe's way of saying it noticed.
The Goldcrown mod (goldcrownissb) may have related interactions.
The Scarlet Crown from the Manifestor Trap may have late-game effects.
The Philosopher's Stone from Ch16 (optional) amplifies this further.
